StackView.Name: HeroContent
StackView.TextBlock: A modern UI engine for games and native apps. Compose layouts from grids, stacks, text, and images — all rendered at 60 fps.

TextBlock.Name: TabbedTechHeading
TextBlock.Text: Build the UI, not the ceremony

TextBlock.Name: TabbedTechSubheading
TextBlock.Text: A clean XML surface, Lua where things move, MoonScript when the app grows, and one UI that can travel across targets.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: SignalXml
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Title: XML-first screens
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Layouts stay readable.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: SignalLua
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Title: Lua beside the view
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Behavior stays close.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: SignalMoon
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Title: MoonScript when it grows
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Less noise, same runtime.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: SignalShip
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Title: Desktop, mobile, web
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: One screen, many targets.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: SignalSpeed
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Title: Fast edit-run-refine
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: See changes immediately.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: SignalScale
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Title: Built to scale
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Same UI, larger ambitions.

TextBlock.Name: XmlBody
TextBlock.Text: The screen stays legible at a glance, which makes it easy to scan, compare, and reshape as the design evolves.

TextBlock.Name: XmlNote1
TextBlock.Text: • Grids and stacks stay visible in the source.

TextBlock.Name: XmlNote2
TextBlock.Text: • Spacing, padding, and hierarchy remain explicit.

TextBlock.Name: XmlNote3
TextBlock.Text: • The shape of the screen is easy to read before it ever runs.

TextBlock.Name: XmlModelHeading
TextBlock.Text: The structure stays honest

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: LuaPanelHeader
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Title: Lua stays close to the surface

TextBlock.Name: LuaBody
TextBlock.Text: The parts that move stay beside the screen that uses them, so interaction and state feel close and easy to change.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: LuaCard1
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Tap, click, and selection handling can sit right beside the view that needs it.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: LuaCard2
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Small state objects stay local, so the screen remains easy to reason about.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: LuaCard3
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Let Lua connect the moving pieces while XML keeps the hierarchy in view.

TextBlock.Name: MoonBody
TextBlock.Text: MoonScript keeps larger app code compact and expressive, while still compiling to the same Lua runtime.

TextBlock.Name: MoonNote1
TextBlock.Text: • Helpful when app modules get a little larger.

TextBlock.Name: MoonNote2
TextBlock.Text: • The syntax stays concise, but the runtime stays Lua.

TextBlock.Name: MoonNote3
TextBlock.Text: • It pairs naturally with XML screens and Lua helpers.

TextBlock.Name: MoonModelHeading
TextBlock.Text: Same runtime, less ceremony

TextBlock.Name: MoonModelLine1
TextBlock.Text: Cleaner class bodies

TextBlock.Name: MoonModelLine2
TextBlock.Text: Readable app controllers

TextBlock.Name: MoonModelLine3
TextBlock.Text: Plain Lua at runtime

TextBlock.Name: MoonModelLine4
TextBlock.Text: Comfortable beside XML layouts

TextBlock.Name: DeployBody
TextBlock.Text: Build once, tune the spacing, and carry the same design language across desktop, mobile, and web-oriented targets.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: DeployCard1
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Best when you want denser information, more breathing room, and precision input.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: DeployCard2
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Responsive spacing keeps the same interface calm and touch-friendly on smaller screens.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: DeployCard3
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: The same screen model can carry into browser workflows without being rewritten.

TextBlock.Name: DeployCommandLabel
TextBlock.Text: Desktop build

TextBlock.Name: DeployCommandValue
TextBlock.Text: make clean && make -j8 && build/bin/orca samples/Example

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: FeatureXmlCard
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Title: XML stays readable
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: The layout tree is right there in the page, so structure and spacing stay easy to tune.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: FeatureLuaCard
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Title: Lua stays close
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Interactions, bindings, and state can live next to the screen that owns them.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: FeatureShipCard
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Title: Ships everywhere
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: The same UI can move across desktop, mobile, and web-friendly targets.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: FeatureSpeedCard
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Title: Fast iteration
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Edit, reload, and refine quickly without losing the overall shape of the interface.

TextBlock.Name: GallerySubheading
TextBlock.Text: Screenshots and scenes rendered entirely by the ORCA engine.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: GalleryCard1
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Title: Lake Scene
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Subtitle: Real-time reflections and water surface rendered at 60 fps.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: GalleryCard2
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Subtitle: High-fidelity texture sampling with anisotropic filtering.

TextBlock.Name: WorkflowHeading
TextBlock.Text: How It Works

TextBlock.Name: WorkflowSubheading
TextBlock.Text: From XML layout to a live rendered scene in four simple steps.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: Step1
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Subtitle: Define Layout
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Write your screen as an XML file with familiar Grid and StackView containers.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: Step2
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Subtitle: Load Assets
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Images, fonts, and data files are streamed from packages at runtime.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: Step3
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Subtitle: Script Logic
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Attach Lua scripts to any component for interactivity and data binding.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: Step4
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Deploy to desktop, mobile, or WebGL with a single build command.

TextBlock.Name: TestimonialsHeading
TextBlock.Text: What Developers Say

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: Quote1
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Title: — Alex R.
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Subtitle: Lead Engineer
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: ORCA lets us ship native-quality UI on every platform from a single XML source. It changed how we build products.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: Quote2
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Title: — Sam T.
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Subtitle: UI Architect
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: The declarative layout system is a joy to work with. Our designers write XML and developers hook up the logic — perfect split.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: Quote3
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Title: — Jordan M.
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Subtitle: Game Developer
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Sub-millisecond frame times even on mid-range hardware. We ditched our old HTML renderer the day we tried ORCA.

TextBlock.Name: CtaHeading
TextBlock.Text: Ready to build something great?

TextBlock.Name: CtaBody
TextBlock.Text: Download ORCA, open a sample project, and have your first screen running in minutes.

TextBlock.Name: CtaButtonPrimary
TextBlock.Text: Get Started

TextBlock.Name: CtaButtonSecondary
TextBlock.Text: Learn more
